2024-25 UIC Flames Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 17-14 (10-10, 5th in MVC MBB)

Coach: Rob Ehsan

PS/G: 76.0 (115th of 364)

PA/G: 73.7 (234th of 364)

SRS: -0.62 (156th of 364)

SOS: 0.58 (121st of 364)

ORtg: 108.2 (158th of 364)

DRtg: 105.0 (185th of 364)
